evals.prompt: I just opened PR #366 on onprofit-portal (fix(ON-2078): restore outcome rules alongside scripts). Can you check if all the docs and docstrings are still accurate after these changes?
evals.expected_output: Should identify any stale docstrings, README references, or inline comments that no longer match the code changes in the PR. Should fix any issues found.

evals.prompt: Review the docs accuracy for PR #310 on onprofit-core (feat(ON-2043): Schedule next call relative to last user message). Make sure all docstrings and markdown docs still match the code.
evals.expected_output: Should analyze the feature PR, find any docstrings with wrong parameter descriptions, outdated README sections, or missing docs for new public functions. Should fix issues found.

evals.prompt: Check if the documentation is still correct in PR #321 on onprofit-services-api (feat(ON-1413): Add warm transfer data to post-call webhook payload). I want to make sure the API docs and docstrings match the new webhook payload.
evals.expected_output: Should find any OpenAPI/Swagger spec mismatches, docstrings with outdated parameter/return descriptions, and README sections describing the webhook payload that need updating. Should fix issues.
